/usr/bin/clang++ -fPIC -g -shared -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/qstring_utilities.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libqstring_utilities.so -o libqstring_utilities.so CMakeFiles/qstring_utilities.dir/qstring_utilities_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qstring_utilities.dir/qstring_utilities.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
